governance.production_rule: Only approved, versioned method cards may produce a decision-grade component value.
governance.library_role: Library sources establish reusable method logic and failure modes; issuer primary evidence supplies company facts.
governance.crowd_rule: Independent reviewers nominate methods, challenge assumptions, and supply base rates. Incompatible values are never averaged.
governance.arithmetic_rule: Deterministic calculators, not LLMs, produce final values.

method_cards.label: Finite royalty distribution curve
method_cards.economic_claim: After-expense distributions from a legally defined royalty or trust claim over finite production.
allowed_judgments: production cadence within evidenced capacity and reserve bounds
method_cards.scenario_rule: Cases vary production cadence, price/bonus attainment, downtime, reserve exhaustion, costs, and discount rate causally.
double_counting_exclusions: Do not deduct depletion again when reserve exhaustion is already in the cash-flow schedule.
Do not include legal recovery for ordinary royalties already accrued.
failure_modes: perpetual terminal value on a finite claim
operator concentration haircut added after downtime is modeled

method_cards.label: Reconciled net asset value
method_cards.economic_claim: Audited or contractually supported assets less senior claims, realization costs, taxes, and friction.
allowed_judgments: timing discount when sale is not immediate
method_cards.scenario_rule: Cases vary cited unit values, realization timing, and bounded friction; asset quantities remain source locked.
double_counting_exclusions: Do not capitalize operating cash flow and the same asset inventory separately.
failure_modes: gross asset value presented as equity value

method_cards.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_cards.economic_claim: Present value of distributable owner cash after charging the capital required for growth.
method_cards.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)
method_cards.scenario_rule: Growth changes only through reinvestment and incremental return; terminal assumptions must reconcile to competitive durability.
double_counting_exclusions: Acquisition spend and stock compensation cannot be omitted from owner cash.
failure_modes: historical ROIC substituted for incremental ROIC
terminal value dominates without a durability proof

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

method_cards.label: Capital-cycle normalized capacity value
method_cards.economic_claim: Equity value supported by normalized utilization and unit margins after maintenance capital and downside reserves.
method_cards.scenario_rule: Cases reconcile supply additions, utilization, price/margin, maintenance needs, and liquidity.
double_counting_exclusions: Do not add replacement value for capacity already valued through normalized cash flow.
failure_modes: replacement cost for assets unable to earn their cost of capital

method_cards.label: Tangible capital and excess-return value
method_cards.economic_claim: Tangible equity plus the finite value of normalized returns above the cost of equity, less stress losses and senior claims.
method_cards.scenario_rule: Cases vary credit losses, funding cost, normalized ROE, duration, and distributable capital.
double_counting_exclusions: Regulatory capital is not both tangible equity and distributable excess capital.
failure_modes: loss normalization without a stress case

method_cards.label: Mutually exclusive catalyst event tree
method_cards.economic_claim: Expected present equity payoff across exhaustive, mutually exclusive completion, delay, and break outcomes.
method_cards.scenario_rule: Every case is exhaustive and probabilities sum to one; delay and failure are explicit outcomes.
double_counting_exclusions: A payoff and the underlying asset NAV cannot both be added.
failure_modes: probabilities do not sum to one

sources.locator: Probability, beneficiary, timing and failure cases

method_cards.label: Milestone risk-adjusted present value
method_cards.economic_claim: Net cash plus probability-weighted asset success values less remaining costs and dilution.
method_cards.scenario_rule: Cases alter milestone probability, timing, costs, dilution and failure recovery using explicit reference classes.
double_counting_exclusions: Pipeline value cannot also appear in an operating revenue forecast.

method_cards.label: Predictable owner-cash discount model
method_cards.economic_claim: Value of sustainable owner cash or distributions after required funding and dilution.
method_cards.scenario_rule: Required return must exceed growth; cases vary renewal/reset economics and funding causally.
double_counting_exclusions: Growth capital cannot be ignored and then counted as free growth.

source_records.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations
Probability, beneficiary, timing and failure cases
